name: terriblegeralds
description: Terrible Gerald's Pizza — MERN web app with admin content management

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: npm ci --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build:railway: npm ci --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ../server && npm run lint
scripts.clean: rm -rf client/dist server/dist client/node_modules server/node_modules node_modules

author: Terrible Gerald's Pizza
